creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #63)

Hm, I didn't think my diffs changed RTL8188EU behaviour!

The RTL8188E code uses the RTL8192C channel change code but overrides a couple of methods. None of the rest of the power sequencing, channel change or RF register programming is shared with the RTL8192E code.
